channel.title: CyberNetSec - Data Breach
channel.description: Latest data breach threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Medtronic Confirms Data Breach After ShinyHunters Claims Theft of 9 Million Records and Corporate Data
item.description:
Medical device manufacturer Medtronic has confirmed it sustained a cybersecurity incident following claims by the ShinyHunters threat group. The group alleged it stole over 9 million records and terabytes of corporate data, issuing a 'pay or leak' ultimatum. Medtronic stated the breach was contained...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: ShinyHunters Leaks 1.4 Million Udemy User Records, Including Financial Data, After Failed Extortion
item.description:
The ShinyHunters cybercrime group has publicly leaked a database containing 1.4 million records from the online learning platform Udemy after a 'pay or leak' extortion attempt failed. The compromised data is extensive, including user and instructor PII, contact information, and sensitive financial p...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: ShinyHunters Ransomware Spree: Carnival, Zara's Parent, and 40+ Firms Breached in Massive Campaign
item.description:
The ShinyHunters ransomware group has claimed responsibility for a large-scale attack campaign that has compromised more than 40 organizations worldwide. The victims, listed on the group's data leak site, span the retail, insurance, and hospitality sectors. High-profile targets include Carnival Corp...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Entertainment Industry Failing on Security Basics, MPA Report Reveals Widespread Risks
item.description:
The Motion Picture Association's (MPA) Trusted Partner Network (TPN) has released its first TPN STAR Report, revealing systemic security vulnerabilities across the global entertainment supply chain. The report finds that while most organizations have security policies, inconsistent execution of basi...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Policy and Compliance, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Rituals Cosmetics Data Breach Exposes Personal Info of 'My Rituals' Members
item.description:
Amsterdam-based luxury cosmetics company Rituals has confirmed a data breach impacting members of its 'My Rituals' loyalty program, which has over 40 million members. The company began notifying affected customers on April 22, 2026, after discovering the incident earlier in the month. Compromised da...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: Checkmarx Details Supply Chain Attack Stemming from Trivy Scanner Vulnerability
item.description:
Application security firm Checkmarx has provided a detailed timeline of a supply chain attack that began with the exploitation of a vulnerability in the Trivy scanner. The attack, which started on March 23, 2026, led to unauthorized access to Checkmarx's GitHub environment. Attackers published malic...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Data Breach, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Wisconsin Hospital Mile Bluff Medical Center Hit by Ransomware, Enters Downtime Procedures
item.description:
Mile Bluff Medical Center in Mauston, Wisconsin, has confirmed it is recovering from a ransomware attack that occurred in April 2026. The attack encrypted files on the medical center's network, causing temporary disruptions to computer and phone systems. Clinical teams were forced to revert to estab...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Utility Tech Giant Itron Discloses Breach of Internal IT Network
item.description:
Itron, a major American technology provider for energy and water utilities, has disclosed a cybersecurity incident in an SEC filing. The company reported on April 13, 2026, that an unauthorized third party had gained access to a segment of its internal IT systems. Upon discovery, Itron activated its...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Cyberattack, Data Breach, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Global Wings Airline Breach Exposes Personal Data of 5 Million Passengers via Third-Party Vendor
item.description:
Global Wings Airline has disclosed a major data breach affecting approximately 5 million of its passengers. The breach originated not within the airline's own systems, but from a third-party service provider responsible for managing the 'SkyMiles' loyalty program database. The exposed data includes ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Cura360 HealthTech Startup Leaks 250,000 Patient Records via Public AWS S3 Bucket
item.description:
A severe data leak at health-tech startup Cura360 has exposed the protected health information (PHI) and personal data of over 250,000 patients. The cause was a misconfigured Amazon Web Services (AWS) S3 bucket that was left publicly accessible, allowing anyone on the internet to view and download i...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Cloud Security, Policy and Compliance

Read Full Article →
